name: Mario Marcolongo Professional Evidence Interface
description: Agent-to-Agent discovery interface for Mario Marcolongo's evidence-bound professional dossier, AI safety evaluation activity, scientific fact-checking record, research-verification workflows and public open-science records.

queryDossier.description: Retrieve the professional summary, work history, application positioning, skills and public evidence links.

queryMasterCv.description: Access the machine-readable master CV and comprehensive evidence record.

queryGenomicRecord.description: Access public notes and identifiers for the 41× WGS donation under ENA PRJEB109744.

skills.name: AI Safety Evaluation & Adversarial Testing
skills.description: Self-directed model-behavior testing across chat, image, agentic tool-use and indirect prompt-injection challenges, with evidence-bound reporting and explicit limitations.

skills.name: Scientific Evidence & Research Verification
skills.description: Primary-source fact-checking, bibliographic research, claim decomposition, source-quality assessment, evidence screening and cross-source corroboration.

skills.name: Structured Data Quality & Provenance
skills.description: Metadata structure, public-source reconciliation, verification workflows, provenance documentation and open-science records across Wikimedia, Wikidata, FAIRsharing, Zenodo and ENA.

skills.name: Code-Literate Technical Operations
skills.description: Codebase reading and behavior inspection, requirements definition, functional testing, deployment operations and AI-assisted implementation workflows; not represented as independent software engineering.
